requirement_topic.en: EMC — Electromagnetic Compatibility Standards (Radiated / Conducted Emissions)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 电磁兼容标准（辐射/传导发射）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 電磁相容標準（輻射/傳導發射）

summary.en: Tonga follows Australian/New Zealand EMC standards aligned with AS/NZS CISPR series standards for electromagnetic emissions from electronic and electrical equipment. Wireless devices placed on the Tongan market must demonstrate EMC conformance consistent with AS/NZS standards referenced by TAL and relevant Tongan regulatory authorities. AS/NZS CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment) and AS/NZS 4268 (Wi-Fi/radio equipment) are the primary references for wireless and IoT devices. CE (EN CISPR 32) and FCC Part 15 EMC approvals are not directly recognised in Tonga, but AS/NZS-based test reports or equivalent technical data may be submitted to support TAL type approval. CCC EMC certification is not recognised.
summary.zh: 汤加遵循与AS/NZS CISPR系列标准对接的澳大利亚/新西兰EMC标准，用于评估电子电气设备的电磁发射。在汤加市场销售的无线设备须证明符合TAL及相关汤加监管机构参照的AS/NZS标准的EMC要求。AS/NZS CISPR 32（多媒体设备）和AS/NZS 4268（Wi-Fi/无线设备）是无线及物联网设备的主要参考标准。CE（EN CISPR 32）及FCC Part 15 EMC认证在汤加不被直接认可，但AS/NZS测试报告或等效技术数据可作为TAL型号认证的支持材料提交。CCC EMC认证不被认可。
summary.zht: 東加遵循與AS/NZS CISPR系列標準對接的澳大利亞/新西蘭EMC標準，用於評估電子電氣設備的電磁發射。在東加市場銷售的無線裝置須證明符合TAL及相關東加監管機構參照的AS/NZS標準的EMC要求。AS/NZS CISPR 32（多媒體設備）和AS/NZS 4268（Wi-Fi/無線裝置）是無線及物聯網裝置的主要參考標準。CE（EN CISPR 32）及FCC Part 15 EMC認證在東加不被直接認可，但AS/NZS測試報告或等效技術數據可作為TAL型號認證的支持材料提交。CCC EMC認證不被認可。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS CISPR 32:2015 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment (emissions requirements); adopted in Australia/NZ and referenced in Pacific region
AS/NZS 4268 — Radio communications equipment — general requirements (Wi-Fi and spread-spectrum equipment)
TAL Type Approval Framework — EMC conformance evidence required as part of type approval application

summary.en: In China, wireless devices must comply with GB/T 9254 (now superseded by GB/T 9254.1 and GB/T 9254.2 aligning to CISPR 32) for radiated and conducted emissions, and relevant GB radio standards for specific wireless technologies. CCC certification for radio/EMC compliance is obtained through designated China testing laboratories. These GB-based approvals and test reports are not recognised by TAL Tonga.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备须符合GB/T 9254（现已更新为与CISPR 32对应的GB/T 9254.1和GB/T 9254.2）关于辐射和传导发射的要求，以及特定无线技术适用的GB无线标准。通过指定中国测试实验室取得的CCC无线电/EMC认证不被汤加TAL认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線裝置須符合GB/T 9254（現已更新為與CISPR 32對應的GB/T 9254.1和GB/T 9254.2）關於輻射和傳導發射的要求，以及特定無線技術適用的GB無線標準。通過指定中國測試實驗室取得的CCC無線電/EMC認證不被東加TAL認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1 — Class A information technology equipment electromagnetic disturbance (aligns to CISPR 32)
GB/T 9254.2 — Class B information technology equipment electromagnetic disturbance (aligns to CISPR 32)
GB 15629.11 — Chinese WLAN (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz) EMC and radio standard
SRRC type approval — includes radio frequency and emission conformance for China

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 and CCC EMC test reports are not recognised in Tonga. AS/NZS CISPR 32 or AS/NZS 4268 test reports from accredited laboratories are required to support TAL type approval. If a product already holds AS/NZS-based test reports (for example from Australian or New Zealand testing laboratories), those reports may be submitted to TAL. A product holding only Chinese CCC or GB-based EMC test reports will need to obtain AS/NZS-based EMC testing before Tonga market entry.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254及CCC EMC测试报告在汤加不被认可。须取得经认可实验室出具的AS/NZS CISPR 32或AS/NZS 4268测试报告，以支持TAL型号认证申请。如产品已持有AS/NZS测试报告（如来自澳大利亚或新西兰测试实验室），可将其提交至TAL。仅持有中国CCC或GB测试报告的产品，须在进入汤加市场前另行取得AS/NZS EMC测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254及CCC EMC測試報告在東加不被認可。須取得經認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS CISPR 32或AS/NZS 4268測試報告，以支持TAL型號認證申請。如產品已持有AS/NZS測試報告（如來自澳大利亞或新西蘭測試實驗室），可將其提交至TAL。僅持有中國CCC或GB測試報告的產品，須在進入東加市場前另行取得AS/NZS EMC測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformance evidence (AS/NZS-based) required as part of TAL type approval for wireless and telecom terminal equipment in Tonga
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 9254 and relevant GB radio standards compliance required; CCC certification required for in-scope product categories in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Meteorology, Energy, Information, Disaster Management, Environment, Climate Change and Communications (MIC-Tonga) / TAL

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC and GB-based EMC test reports are not recognised in Tonga. AS/NZS CISPR 32 or AS/NZS 4268 test reports from accredited laboratories are needed to support TAL type approval. Products with only Chinese EMC documentation will require additional AS/NZS-based testing before Tonga market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC及GB测试报告在汤加不被认可。须提供经认可实验室出具的AS/NZS CISPR 32或AS/NZS 4268测试报告，以支持TAL型号认证申请。仅持有中国EMC文件的产品，须在进入汤加市场前另行取得AS/NZS测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC及GB測試報告在東加不被認可。須提供經認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS CISPR 32或AS/NZS 4268測試報告，以支持TAL型號認證申請。僅持有中國EMC文件的產品，須在進入東加市場前另行取得AS/NZS測試。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radio Frequency Spectrum and Frequency Band Compliance
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 射频频谱与频段合规
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 射頻頻譜與頻段合規

summary.en: Tonga allocates radio frequency spectrum in general alignment with ITU Region 3 (Asia-Pacific) frequency allocation tables. TAL regulates the use of radio frequency bands in Tonga, and wireless devices operating in Tonga must use approved frequency bands consistent with Tongan spectrum allocation. Unlicensed short-range devices (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz, Bluetooth) generally operate in ITU-aligned ISM bands, but TAL type approval confirms that frequency parameters are compliant. Products operating on frequencies not allocated in Tonga (e.g., some LTE bands used in China but not deployed in Tonga) require specific assessment. Tonga's mobile operator (Digicel Tonga and UCall/Tonga Communications Corporation) network band plans should be confirmed for cellular devices.
summary.zh: 汤加按照ITU第3区（亚太地区）频率分配表进行无线电频谱分配。TAL负责管理汤加境内无线电频段的使用，在汤加运行的无线设备须使用符合汤加频谱分配的核准频段。无许可证短距离设备（Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz、蓝牙）通常在与ITU对接的ISM频段运行，但TAL型号认证须确认频率参数合规。使用汤加未分配频率的产品（如部分在中国使用但汤加未部署的LTE频段）须进行专项评估。蜂窝设备应确认汤加运营商（Digicel Tonga及UCall/汤加通信公司）的网络频段计划。
summary.zht: 東加按照ITU第3區（亞太地區）頻率分配表進行無線電頻譜分配。TAL負責管理東加境內無線電頻段的使用，在東加運行的無線裝置須使用符合東加頻譜分配的核准頻段。無許可證短距離裝置（Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz、藍牙）通常在與ITU對接的ISM頻段運行，但TAL型號認證須確認頻率參數合規。使用東加未分配頻率的產品（如部分在中國使用但東加未部署的LTE頻段）須進行專項評估。蜂窩裝置應確認東加運營商（Digicel Tonga及UCall/東加通信公司）的網絡頻段計劃。

standards_or_laws: ITU Radio Regulations — Region 3 frequency allocation tables (Tonga follows ITU R3 allocations)
Tonga Communications Act 2000 (as amended) — TAL spectrum management authority
TAL Type Approval Framework — frequency compliance verified as part of type approval
AS/NZS 4268 — frequency and technical parameters for Wi-Fi and spread-spectrum equipment

summary.en: In China, SRRC type approval specifies the approved frequency bands and technical parameters for each radio device. China also follows ITU Region 3 allocations but has specific national frequency assignment plans that may differ from Tonga in certain bands (particularly for mobile/LTE bands and some proprietary wireless technologies). SRRC-approved frequency parameters for China are not automatically applicable in Tonga.
summary.zh: 在中国，SRRC型号认证规定了每款无线设备的核准频段和技术参数。中国同样遵循ITU第3区频率分配，但在某些频段（尤其是移动/LTE频段及部分专有无线技术）的具体国家频率分配计划可能与汤加有所不同。中国SRRC核准的频率参数不自动适用于汤加。
summary.zht: 在中國，SRRC型號認證規定了每款無線裝置的核准頻段和技術參數。中國同樣遵循ITU第3區頻率分配，但在某些頻段（尤其是移動/LTE頻段及部分專有無線技術）的具體國家頻率分配計劃可能與東加有所不同。中國SRRC核准的頻率參數不自動適用於東加。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — specifies approved frequency bands and technical parameters for China market
MIIT frequency assignment plans — national frequency allocation for mobile, Wi-Fi, and other wireless technologies in China
GB 15629.11 — 2.4 GHz WLAN frequency and technical parameters
GB 15629.21 — Bluetooth frequency and technical parameters

gap.en: SRRC-approved frequency parameters for China are not automatically valid in Tonga. TAL type approval must confirm that the product's frequency bands and emission parameters are consistent with Tongan spectrum allocation. For cellular devices, the specific LTE/5G band plan must be verified against the bands actually deployed by Tongan operators (Digicel Tonga, TCC). Some bands approved in China may not be allocated or deployed in Tonga, requiring product configuration review.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准的频率参数不自动在汤加有效。TAL型号认证须确认产品的频段和发射参数与汤加频谱分配一致。对于蜂窝设备，须核实具体LTE/5G频段计划是否与汤加运营商（Digicel Tonga、TCC）实际部署的频段相符。部分在中国核准的频段在汤加可能未分配或未部署，需对产品配置进行审查。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准的頻率參數不自動在東加有效。TAL型號認證須確認產品的頻段和發射參數與東加頻譜分配一致。對於蜂窩裝置，須核實具體LTE/5G頻段計劃是否與東加運營商（Digicel Tonga、TCC）實際部署的頻段相符。部分在中國核准的頻段在東加可能未分配或未部署，需對產品配置進行審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — frequency band compliance verified as part of TAL type approval for all radio equipment operated in Tonga
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC type approval specifies and restricts approved frequency bands for each radio product in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Meteorology, Energy, Information, Disaster Management, Environment, Climate Change and Communications (MIC-Tonga) / TAL

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese SRRC frequency approvals do not automatically apply in Tonga. TAL type approval must verify that the product's frequency bands and emission parameters comply with Tongan spectrum allocation. Cellular device band plans should be confirmed against Tongan operator deployments before export.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC频率认证不自动适用于汤加。TAL型号认证须核实产品频段和发射参数是否符合汤加频谱分配。蜂窝设备频段计划应在出口前与汤加运营商部署情况进行核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC頻率認證不自動適用於東加。TAL型號認證須核實產品頻段和發射參數是否符合東加頻譜分配。蜂窩裝置頻段計劃應在出口前與東加運營商部署情況進行核實。
